response.overview: A group of furniture pieces must part with the clothes that hold the memories of the owner who once lived with them. The wardrobe, however, is unwilling to let go of its memories. With the help of the other furniture, the wardrobe begins to understand the transience of time and the owner's pain.
response.tagline: A group of furniture pieces must part with the clothes that hold the memories of the owner who once lived with them.
response.title: 가구들의 사후세계
